title: Citronella Candle Outdoors Tea Lights Set of 6 x 60g - Fly Repellent Candles and Mosquito Repellent Candles Outdoor, BBQ, Camping by Great British Home
features: Natural Pest Repellent: The PestShield Citronella Candle in a hexagon jar effectively repels mosquitoes, flies, and other flying insects with natural citronella oil.
Long-Lasting Fragrance: Each Outdoor Candles for Bugs provide a prolonged bug repellent effect, ensuring your outdoor spaces remain pest-free and enjoyable for hours.
Versatile Outdoor Use: Perfect for camping, BBQs, fishing, or any outdoor activity, these mosquito repellent candles outdoor are a must-have for a comfortable, insect-free environment.
Fresh and Calming Scent: The strong lemony fragrance of these Citronella Candle Outdoor not only keeps pests away but also creates a calming and relaxing atmosphere.
Convenient Multi-Pack: This set includes six 60g hexagon jar candles, offering ample protection and a stylish addition to your outdoor decor.
description: Enhance your outdoor experiences with the PestShield Citronella Hexagon Jar Candle, available in a convenient set of six, thoughtfully bundled for you by Great British Home. These outdoor citronella candles are made with natural citronella oil, renowned for its effectiveness in repelling mosquitoes, flies, and other flying insects. Ideal for a variety of outdoor settings such as camping, BBQs, and fishing trips, these fly repellent candles ensure you can enjoy your activities without the nuisance of bugs. The PestShield Citronella Candle features a strong lemony scent that not only deters pests but also provides a calming and relaxing ambiance. Each 60g hexagon jar candle offers long-lasting fragrance, making it a reliable anti mosquito candle for any outdoor space. Whether you’re setting up for a garden party or simply enjoying a quiet evening on your patio, these mosquito repellent candles outdoor are essential for a pleasant, pest-free environment.
